topic: Hidden costs of planning a corporate event in-house
hook: Your team spent three months planning that event — and nobody counted that as a cost.
script_he: הצוות שלכם בילה שלושה חודשים בתכנון האירוע — ואף אחד לא ספר את זה כעלות. זה הסוד שאף אחד לא מדבר עליו: הקצאת זמן פנימי, טעויות של חסרי ניסיון, ו-vendor relationships שאתם פשוט לא מביאים איתכם — אלה עולים לכם הרבה יותר מאשר שכר הפקה מקצועי. ב-UPE ראינו את זה קורה שוב ושוב ב-1,500 פרויקטים ב-130 יעדים. העלות האמיתית של האירוע שלכם היא לא בהצעת המחיר — היא בכל מה שלא כתוב בה. רוצים לדעת מה באמת עולה לכם? שלחו לנו DM.
script_en: Your team spent three months planning that event — and nobody counted that as a cost. That's the secret nobody talks about: internal hours, first-timer mistakes, and vendor relationships you simply don't have — they cost you far more than a professional production fee. Across 1,500+ events in 130+ destinations, we've seen it happen every single time. The real price of your event isn't on the quote — it's everything the quote doesn't show. Want to know what you're actually spending? DM us.
captions: 3 months of your team's time = a hidden invoice
The real cost isn't on the quote
post_caption: That 'cheaper' in-house event? It's probably costing you more than you think — and we can prove it 🧾 The hidden costs of DIY corporate event planning are real: staff hours, rookie vendor mistakes, and zero leverage on pricing. After 1,500+ events across 130+ destinations, we know exactly where the money quietly disappears. Save this post before your next planning meeting. 👇 #CorporateEvents #EventProduction #IncentiveTravel #HRLeaders #EventPlanning #B2BEvents
scene: Sofia stands in a sleek, sun-lit hotel pre-function foyer — marble floors, tall windows with soft natural light, a tasteful floral arrangement nearby — looking directly at camera with a knowing, slightly raised eyebrow, tablet in hand.
